title: Watch the time
author: Priya
content:
Time is the most precious resource whose value is much more worthy than the money we earn. Anything lost can be recovered, a lost path can be retraced, but not time. Time is a brook, a stream of river that once flowed, lost forever. New waves recreate and destroy and form a cycle of repeatable task but 1 stream of water may fuse with the other and form a goblet of water and ends itself in the process. Time too has the same presence in our life and we should value it before every minute of its passing. What has happened in the past is our retrospection and cannot be changed, but moving with time is our present for a better future. The nostalgia of our past happenings can be rosy, cozy, or even blowsy, but there is no such time machine to go back in time and change your unpolished days of the past.


  Earth moves with time to cause day, night, months, year. It teaches us our real worth. What we were yesterday, what we are today, and what we wanted to be is the time ticking clock behind. Every minute of our time moves with the biological clock of our body. Our body has an end stage of survival, but not the time. It is an apocalypse for people with put off, and let-go mindset, and a life changer for those who move with the times. Crops grow with the season, winds flow with the weather, and similarly, our birth and death are a reversible process, but time is an infinite plane of seconds and with no capsize for it to let up.

How to keep track of time 

-> We say that "slow and steady wins the race".So, move with time, don't make time go with you because time waits for none. Learn to be a good time manager. Be a planner of your time and roster it as per your work input. Have a systemised work plan to put your chain of thoughts into action. Govern the clock, not be governed by it. Be the pilot of your time. Don't let time drive you. Your work needs a time tracker to change your aspirations into reality. Model it, frame it as your centerpiece, and tailor it for your own good. Be a composure of your own time, walk past it, and be an achiever of your own dreams. 

Some over the edge practices to sail yourself through time to boom with your doom -

~ Set a reminder of your time to trigger you to work for action.

~ Slot your list of to-do work with time and act on it in the stipulated time order.

~ Keep an alert listener close to yourself that can refractor your mind into work.


Use your time wisely and make it more yielding and promising for an upward inflection on your success trail. Be a sanative healer of your time and customise your calendar for another day of upheavals of good and bad. A good time can give you a life of flourishing joy and fulfillment, days of laughter and exuberance. So, invest in yourself and manipulate your time for your good. Go above the bar of impassable barriers of your inability, and re-model it for a new tomorrow which is full of unrealistic expectations, unparalleled boundaries of success at the top of the ladder of your career, your venture, and above all, your perils of conquest and collapse.
